name: Gemini 3 Flash
summary: Gemini 3 Flash is Google’s high-speed frontier AI model, optimized for low latency while maintaining strong reasoning and multimodal capabilities.
whyItMatters: Gemini 3 Flash solves the trade-off between intelligence and responsiveness. It enables real-time, consumer-scale AI experiences such as search, assistants, and rapid agent workflows without the computational overhead of frontier research models.
